title: A system and method for detecting and preventing call forwarding fraud in mobile communication networks
abstract: The present invention generally relates to a system (1) and method (100) which detects and prevents forwarding frauds connecting to a called subscriber by forwarding call to a number registered in a domestic network (DN) and making a domestic call over the forwarded number when performing call set-up between international mobile operators. The inventive system (1) comprises signalling data unit (2), transferred numbers database (3), data gathering unit (4), interpretation unit (5) and suspicious numbers database (6).
